text.title: Reasoning-First Architectures — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by classifier-inferred task type and difficulty to {standard, Extended Thinking, o3, o4-mini, DeepSeek R1} with budget per node.

decision-tree.root-question: Does eval_evidence show reasoning_lift > agreed threshold on this task type?

conclusion.verdict: route=standard; do NOT adopt reasoning route without proven lift

branch.question: Did classifier mark this request as 'hard'?

example.trace: planning + classifier=hard + eval_lift=0.18 → o3 with 32K budget
example.code: eval_evidence_present=true, lift=0.18 → q-classifier → classifier_hard=true → q-type → task_type=planning → r2-task-type-budget verdict: o3 + budget 32768
